subtitle: The time of magic and artifice

events.title: First peoples are recorded.
events.text: Here appears the first surviving record of sentient activities.

events.title: Dragons Emerge.
events.text: Dragons are documented, as a new and never seen phenomena.

events.title: The Artificium
events.text: Dolor of Tahlena, now only a mythical figure creates a first artifice device.

events.title: Founding of Valen
events.text: The city of Valen is established.

events.title: Exi's Emporium Opens
events.text: A curious merchant begins collecting relics.
